suppress.notes: Suppressing known vulnerability CVE-2024-38820 in Spring Framework 5.3.39. Will be resolved by upgrading to Spring 6.x or commercial Spring 5.3.40+.

file name: kotlin-reflect-1.6.21.jar
Introduced by pact library, test dependency - should hopefully be resolved by pact 4.7 when out of beta Possibly incorrect tagging of CVE too - it was resolved in 1.4.21 but the cve has been tagged as up to 2.1.0
